materials.name: Organic cotton
materials.reason: Renewable natural fiber with lower pesticide use than conventional cotton

materials.name: Cotton
materials.reason: Natural biodegradable fiber; conventional cotton is water-intensive

materials.name: Linen
materials.reason: Natural fiber, typically lower water use than cotton

materials.name: Hemp
materials.reason: Fast-growing natural fiber with low pesticide needs

materials.name: Wool
materials.reason: Natural animal fiber; impacts depend on farming practices

materials.name: Silk
materials.reason: Natural protein fiber; energy use in processing varies

materials.name: Bamboo
materials.reason: Often rayon from bamboo; processing chemicals may apply

materials.name: Recycled polyester
materials.reason: Synthetic but diverts plastic from landfill

materials.name: Polyester
materials.reason: Petroleum-based synthetic; microplastic shedding when washed

materials.name: Nylon
materials.reason: Synthetic polymer; energy-intensive production

materials.name: Acrylic
materials.reason: Synthetic fiber; sheds microplastics

materials.name: Spandex / elastane
materials.reason: Synthetic stretch fiber, usually blended

materials.name: PU / faux leather
materials.reason: Plastic-based alternative to leather

materials.name: Leather
materials.reason: Animal hide; tanning chemicals and methane from livestock

materials.name: PVC / vinyl
materials.reason: Plastic with harmful additives; hard to recycle

materials.name: Rubber
materials.reason: Durable; natural rubber is better than synthetic

materials.name: Stainless steel
materials.reason: Durable and recyclable metal

materials.name: Aluminium
materials.reason: Recyclable metal; smelting is energy-intensive

materials.name: Glass
materials.reason: Inert and recyclable

materials.name: Silicone
materials.reason: Durable synthetic; not widely curbside recyclable

materials.name: Wood
materials.reason: Renewable if responsibly sourced (FSC helps)
